name: E2E: a multi-clause rule is drafted with every clause accounted for (no language silently dropped) and then routed to a review queue
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/draft-custom-rule.sh" --rule-id g-multi --tool eslint --prose 'Never use var. Avoid console.log. Names should be clear. Use strict equality.' --json > d.json 2>dr.txt; drc=$?; node -e 'const d=require(process.cwd()+"/d.json");const s=d.clauses_covered+d.clauses_fallback+d.clauses_unenforceable;if(s!==d.clauses_total)process.exit(1);if(d.no_clause_dropped!==true)process.exit(1)' && [ "$drc" -eq 0 ] && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/review-queue.sh" --in d.json 2>rq.txt && grep -qE 'rule=g-multi .* queue=(auto-stage|coverage-review|side-by-side-review)' rq.txt && echo e2e9-no-language-dropped 1>&2
